{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media & Admissions Support Officer",
  "description": "Talent Management Alliance (TMAsourcing Solutions) - Our client, a fast-growing travel, education, and business consulting company focused on international opportunities, relocation support, and study abroad services.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media &amp; Admissions Support Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Remote / Hybrid)
Industry: Travel &amp; Business Consulting
Work Schedule: Monday - Saturday (Half day on Saturdays)

Job Summary


	We are seeking a smart, proactive, and organized Social Media &amp; Admissions Support Officerwho will support the company&rsquo;s digital growth, customer engagement, admissions processing, visa support, lead generation, and administrative coordination.
	The ideal candidate should be social media savvy, detail-oriented, customer-friendly, and able to manage multiple responsibilities effectively.


Key Responsibilities
Social Media Management:


	Create and publish engaging content across Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, WhatsAppand other platform
	Assist with recording, editing, and posting videos and graphics
	Write captions, hashtags, and content descriptions
	Monitor audience engagement, comments, and Dms
	Support the growth and visibility of the brand using content and social media strategies
	Utilize tools such as Canva, CapCut, and other AI/content tools to improve productivity


Lead Generation &amp; Follow Up:


	Respond promptly to inquiries from social media and WhatsApp
	Follow up consistently with interested prospects and clients
	Qualify leads and direct serious prospects into the sales pipeline
	Maintain organized records of leads and conversations
	Support conversion of prospects into paying clients


Admissions &amp; Visa Support:


	Assist clients with admission and application processes
	Organize and review application documents and checklists
	Track application progress and communicate updates to clients
	Support visa application preparation and documentation
	Maintain professionalism and confidentiality when handling client information


Administrative Support:


	Maintain organized records using Google Drive, spreadsheets, or CRM tools
	Attend meetings and provide weekly operational updates
	Prepare weekly reports on content performance, leads, and application progress
	Assist with customer service and client communication when required


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Consistency and quality of social media content published weekly
	Growth in engagement, visibility, and followers across platforms
	Number of qualified leads generated and followed up
	Response time to customer inquiries and follow-up effectiveness
	Number of successful admissions and visa support cases handled
	Accuracy in record keeping and reporting
	Overall professionalism, productivity, and contribution to team goals.


Requirements &amp; Preferred Qualities


	Minimum of OND, HND, or B.Sc. in any discipline
	2 years and above experience in social media, customer service, admissions support, or administrative roles
	Age Range: 25 -35 years
	Good written and spoken English
	Basic knowledge of social media platforms and digital content creation
	Ability to create simple graphics and video content
	Strong communication, follow-up, and customer service skills
	Organized, detail-oriented, and able to multitask effectively
	Proficiency in tools such as Canva, CapCut, Google Workspace, WhatsApp Business, and AI tools is an advantage
	Creative thinker with a positive and professional attitude
	Fast learner, responsible, proactive, and trustworthy
	Interest in travel, relocation, education, or international opportunities is an added advantage.


Salary
N160,000 Monthly.

Benefits


	HMO after probation
	Leave allowance
	Pension (statutory)
	Additional incentives upon meeting monthly targets.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-29",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-30",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "TMAsourcing"
    
  },

      "maxValue": 250000,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }

Social Media & Admissions Support Officer Job at TMAsourcing Solutions




        
    

        
        Talent Management Alliance (TMAsourcing Solutions) - Our client, a fast-growing travel, education, and business consulting company focused on international opportunities, relocation support, and study abroad services.

They are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media & Admissions Support Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time (Remote / Hybrid)
Industry: Travel & Business Consulting
Work Schedule: Monday - Saturday (Half day on Saturdays)

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a smart, proactive, and organized Social Media & Admissions Support Officerwho will support the company’s digital growth, customer engagement, admissions processing, visa support, lead generation, and administrative coordination.
	The ideal candidate should be social media savvy, detail-oriented, customer-friendly, and able to manage multiple responsibilities effectively.


Key Responsibilities
Social Media Management:


	Create and publish engaging content across Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, WhatsAppand other platform
	Assist with recording, editing, and posting videos and graphics
	Write captions, hashtags, and content descriptions
	Monitor audience engagement, comments, and Dms
	Support the growth and visibility of the brand using content and social media strategies
	Utilize tools such as Canva, CapCut, and other AI/content tools to improve productivity


Lead Generation & Follow Up:


	Respond promptly to inquiries from social media and WhatsApp
	Follow up consistently with interested prospects and clients
	Qualify leads and direct serious prospects into the sales pipeline
	Maintain organized records of leads and conversations
	Support conversion of prospects into paying clients


Admissions & Visa Support:


	Assist clients with admission and application processes
	Organize and review application documents and checklists
	Track application progress and communicate updates to clients
	Support visa application preparation and documentation
	Maintain professionalism and confidentiality when handling client information


Administrative Support:


	Maintain organized records using Google Drive, spreadsheets, or CRM tools
	Attend meetings and provide weekly operational updates
	Prepare weekly reports on content performance, leads, and application progress
	Assist with customer service and client communication when required


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Consistency and quality of social media content published weekly
	Growth in engagement, visibility, and followers across platforms
	Number of qualified leads generated and followed up
	Response time to customer inquiries and follow-up effectiveness
	Number of successful admissions and visa support cases handled
	Accuracy in record keeping and reporting
	Overall professionalism, productivity, and contribution to team goals.


Requirements & Preferred Qualities


	Minimum of OND, HND, or B.Sc. in any discipline
	2 years and above experience in social media, customer service, admissions support, or administrative roles
	Age Range: 25 -35 years
	Good written and spoken English
	Basic knowledge of social media platforms and digital content creation
	Ability to create simple graphics and video content
	Strong communication, follow-up, and customer service skills
	Organized, detail-oriented, and able to multitask effectively
	Proficiency in tools such as Canva, CapCut, Google Workspace, WhatsApp Business, and AI tools is an advantage
	Creative thinker with a positive and professional attitude
	Fast learner, responsible, proactive, and trustworthy
	Interest in travel, relocation, education, or international opportunities is an added advantage.


Salary
N160,000 Monthly.

Benefits


	HMO after probation
	Leave allowance
	Pension (statutory)
	Additional incentives upon meeting monthly targets.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior Medical Sales Representative",
  "description": "Divine AG Solutions Limited (RC 1243335) was incorporated in 2015 to provide recruitment and outsourcing services in accordance with the terms agreed between us and our clients. Our goal is to meet the needs of our clients ranging from individual clients, government parastatals, corporate organizations, manufacturing companies, public sectors/organizations, hotels, churches as well as multinationals companies and corporations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Medical Sales Representative

Job Location: Port Harcourt,&nbsp; Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Meet and Exceed territory sales target within agreed budgets and timelines
	Interface with and communicate effectively to customers and key influencers regarding product efficacy and safety, product availability, supply and distribution.
	Maintain key customer relationships and develop and implement strategies for expanding designated customer base in assigned territory.
	Identifying and establishing new business
	Lead the generation of demand for products in government and privately owned health facilities, retail facilities and relevant medical establishments.
	Maintaining detailed records
	Make presentations to healthcare professionals in Hospitals or Pharmacies.
	Analyze sales data to improve sales results
	Monitor competitor activity and products.
	Develop strategies for increasing opportunities to meet and talk to contacts in the healthcare sector.


Requirements


	A Degree in Biological Sciences or related courses.
	3 - 4 years of experience as a medical sales representative
	B.Pharm or Pharm.D is an advantage.
	Must reside inPort Harcourt (PH).
	Planning, analytical, and organizational skills.
	Proficient in Microsoft Office.
	Excellent communication and Presentation skills.
	Customer relationship skills.
	Strong teamwork and networking skills.
	Ability to work under pressure.


Other Benefits


	Salary: N450,000 per month.
	Car
	Products incentive
	Lodgement incentive
	Sales on Overage
	HMO
	Pension
	Leave allowance.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: divineagsolutionsltd@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Senior Medical Sales Representative Job at Divine AG Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        Divine AG Solutions Limited (RC 1243335) was incorporated in 2015 to provide recruitment and outsourcing services in accordance with the terms agreed between us and our clients. Our goal is to meet the needs of our clients ranging from individual clients, government parastatals, corporate organizations, manufacturing companies, public sectors/organizations, hotels, churches as well as multinationals companies and corporations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Medical Sales Representative

Job Location: Port Harcourt,  Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Meet and Exceed territory sales target within agreed budgets and timelines
	Interface with and communicate effectively to customers and key influencers regarding product efficacy and safety, product availability, supply and distribution.
	Maintain key customer relationships and develop and implement strategies for expanding designated customer base in assigned territory.
	Identifying and establishing new business
	Lead the generation of demand for products in government and privately owned health facilities, retail facilities and relevant medical establishments.
	Maintaining detailed records
	Make presentations to healthcare professionals in Hospitals or Pharmacies.
	Analyze sales data to improve sales results
	Monitor competitor activity and products.
	Develop strategies for increasing opportunities to meet and talk to contacts in the healthcare sector.


Requirements


	A Degree in Biological Sciences or related courses.
	3 - 4 years of experience as a medical sales representative
	B.Pharm or Pharm.D is an advantage.
	Must reside inPort Harcourt (PH).
	Planning, analytical, and organizational skills.
	Proficient in Microsoft Office.
	Excellent communication and Presentation skills.
	Customer relationship skills.
	Strong teamwork and networking skills.
	Ability to work under pressure.


Other Benefits


	Salary: N450,000 per month.
	Car
	Products incentive
	Lodgement incentive
	Sales on Overage
	HMO
	Pension
	Leave allowance.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Inventory Officer",
  "description": "Kuddy Cosmetics exemplifies sustainable, homegrown success in Nigeria&rsquo;s beauty sector&mdash;rising from a suitcase startup to a national brand with a loyal following, original product lines, extensive retail outlets, and digital innovation. Kudirat Fashola&rsquo;s journey reflects tenacity, entrepreneurial ingenuity, and a vision that continues to shape Africa&rsquo;s cosmetics industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Officer

Job Location: Tradefair, Amuwo Odofin - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Inventory Officer is responsible for overseeing the company&rsquo;s inventory operations to ensure accurate stock records, proper stock levels, and efficient inventory movement.
	The role involves monitoring stock inflow and outflow, conducting regular stock audits, maintaining inventory reports, and ensuring proper storage and handling of products.


Key Responsibilities


	Monitor and manage inventory levels to ensure adequate stock availability.
	Record and track stock movements including transfers, sales, and returns.
	Conduct routine physical stock counts and reconcile discrepancies.
	Maintain accurate inventory records using inventory management systems or spreadsheets.
	Prepare inventory reports and submit them to management regularly.
	Monitor slow-moving, expired, or damaged products and report accordingly.
	Ensure compliance with company inventory policies and procedures.
	Support internal and external audits related to inventory management.


Requirements and Qualifications


	Minimum of OND / HND / Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration
	Proven experience as an Inventory Officer, Store Keeper, or similar role.
	Strong knowledge of inventory management practices and procedures.
	Excellent organizational and record-keeping skills.
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy.
	Good analytical and problem-solving skills.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
	Good communication and reporting skills.
	Proximity is key, if you dont stay closer to Tradefair, do not apply.


Key Skills:


	Inventory Control
	Stock Management
	Attention to Detail
	Time Management
	Organizational Skills
	Communication Skills
	Problem Solving.


Salary
N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@kuddycosmetics.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Inventory Officer Job at Kuddy Cosmetics




        
    

        
        Kuddy Cosmetics exemplifies sustainable, homegrown success in Nigeria’s beauty sector—rising from a suitcase startup to a national brand with a loyal following, original product lines, extensive retail outlets, and digital innovation. Kudirat Fashola’s journey reflects tenacity, entrepreneurial ingenuity, and a vision that continues to shape Africa’s cosmetics industry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Officer

Job Location: Tradefair, Amuwo Odofin - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Inventory Officer is responsible for overseeing the company’s inventory operations to ensure accurate stock records, proper stock levels, and efficient inventory movement.
	The role involves monitoring stock inflow and outflow, conducting regular stock audits, maintaining inventory reports, and ensuring proper storage and handling of products.


Key Responsibilities


	Monitor and manage inventory levels to ensure adequate stock availability.
	Record and track stock movements including transfers, sales, and returns.
	Conduct routine physical stock counts and reconcile discrepancies.
	Maintain accurate inventory records using inventory management systems or spreadsheets.
	Prepare inventory reports and submit them to management regularly.
	Monitor slow-moving, expired, or damaged products and report accordingly.
	Ensure compliance with company inventory policies and procedures.
	Support internal and external audits related to inventory management.


Requirements and Qualifications


	Minimum of OND / HND / Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration
	Proven experience as an Inventory Officer, Store Keeper, or similar role.
	Strong knowledge of inventory management practices and procedures.
	Excellent organizational and record-keeping skills.
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy.
	Good analytical and problem-solving skills.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
	Good communication and reporting skills.
	Proximity is key, if you dont stay closer to Tradefair, do not apply.


Key Skills:


	Inventory Control
	Stock Management
	Attention to Detail
	Time Management
	Organizational Skills
	Communication Skills
	Problem Solving.


Salary
N100,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Account Officer",
  "description": "Cobranet Limited; a reputable organization incorporated in 2003 and provides internet solutions. Our footprint and range of products have grown immensely since incorporation and we are proud to provide every segment of society with a reliable link to the digital universe.

Our entire network topology is rugged, dynamic and fully redundant with negligible downtimes: content showing extremely high availability exceeding 99.5%. Our promise is to continue providing innovative solutions at the best feature-to-price and service-to-price ratio.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Officer

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Financial Record Keeping: Maintain accurate and timely financial records, ledgers, and accounts.
	Accounts Payable/Receivable: Manage vendor payments, customer invoicing, and collections.
	Bank Reconciliations: Perform regular reconciliations of company bank accounts.
	Financial Reporting: Prepare financial statements, management reports, and support budgeting/forecasting.
	Compliance: Ensure adherence to Nigerian financial regulations (e.g., FIRS, CBN guidelines).
	Tax Matters: Assist with tax computations, filings, and compliance in Nigeria.
	Cost Management: Track costs related to ISP operations (network, infrastructure).
	Audit Support: Provide documentation and cooperate with internal/external auditors.
	Cash Flow Management: Assist in managing company cash flow.
	Collaboration: Work with operations, sales, and technical teams for financial aspects of ISP services.


Specific ISP Context Considerations:


	Billing and Revenue Management: Manage billing for internet/data services, ensuring accuracy.
	Project Costs: Track costs for network expansion/upgrades typical in ISP operations.
	Regulatory Compliance: Adherence to Nigerian Communications Commission (NCC) regulations impacting finances.


Requirements


	Qualifications: Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor`s Degree in Accounting, ACA (ICAN), ACCA, or equivalent.
	Experience: 2 - 3 years of accounting experience, ISP/telecom experience advantageous.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment@cobranet.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Account Officer Job at Cobranet Limited




        
    

        
        Cobranet Limited; a reputable organization incorporated in 2003 and provides internet solutions. Our footprint and range of products have grown immensely since incorporation and we are proud to provide every segment of society with a reliable link to the digital universe.

Our entire network topology is rugged, dynamic and fully redundant with negligible downtimes: content showing extremely high availability exceeding 99.5%. Our promise is to continue providing innovative solutions at the best feature-to-price and service-to-price ratio.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Officer

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Key Responsibilities


	Financial Record Keeping: Maintain accurate and timely financial records, ledgers, and accounts.
	Accounts Payable/Receivable: Manage vendor payments, customer invoicing, and collections.
	Bank Reconciliations: Perform regular reconciliations of company bank accounts.
	Financial Reporting: Prepare financial statements, management reports, and support budgeting/forecasting.
	Compliance: Ensure adherence to Nigerian financial regulations (e.g., FIRS, CBN guidelines).
	Tax Matters: Assist with tax computations, filings, and compliance in Nigeria.
	Cost Management: Track costs related to ISP operations (network, infrastructure).
	Audit Support: Provide documentation and cooperate with internal/external auditors.
	Cash Flow Management: Assist in managing company cash flow.
	Collaboration: Work with operations, sales, and technical teams for financial aspects of ISP services.


Specific ISP Context Considerations:


	Billing and Revenue Management: Manage billing for internet/data services, ensuring accuracy.
	Project Costs: Track costs for network expansion/upgrades typical in ISP operations.
	Regulatory Compliance: Adherence to Nigerian Communications Commission (NCC) regulations impacting finances.


Requirements


	Qualifications: Interested candidates should possess a Bachelor`s Degree in Accounting, ACA (ICAN), ACCA, or equivalent.
	Experience: 2 - 3 years of accounting experience, ISP/telecom experience advantageous.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

About the Role


	We are looking for a driven and experienced Project Manager, Pharmaceutical Lead to oversee our pharmaceutical projects from concept through to commercialisation.
	You will lead a multidisciplinary team, manage project timelines and budgets, and ensure full regulatory compliance, all while driving innovation and delivering results.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead planning, execution, and delivery of pharmaceutical projects across the full product lifecycle.
	Manage project budgets, timelines, and resources effectively.
	Supervise and mentor a team of pharmaceutical professionals.
	Ensure compliance with regulatory requirements, GMP, and quality standards.
	Collaborate cross-functionally with internal teams and external partners.
	Identify and mitigate project risks proactively.
	Represent the company at industry events, conferences, and stakeholder meetings.
	Stay current with pharmaceutical industry trends and regulatory developments.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Pharmaceutical Sciences, Project Management, or a related field.
	Minimum of 7 years of experience in pharmaceutical project management, with a leadership track record.
	PMP, PRINCE2, or equivalent certification is an advantage.
	Strong knowledge of drug development, regulatory frameworks, and GMP standards.
	Hands-on laboratory experience within a pharmaceutical environment.
	Proficient in project management tools and MS Office Suite.
	Excellent communication, leadership, and problem-solving skills.
	Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously in a fast-paced environment.


Salary
N600,000 monthly (net).

        Prestigious Consulting is a professional HR consultancy firm. We focus on improving organizational performance through strategic people & process management.

	We are looking for a driven and experienced Project Manager, Pharmaceutical Lead to oversee our pharmaceutical projects from concept through to commercialisation.
	You will lead a multidisciplinary team, manage project timelines and budgets, and ensure full regulatory compliance, all while driving innovation and delivering results.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead planning, execution, and delivery of pharmaceutical projects across the full product lifecycle.
	Manage project budgets, timelines, and resources effectively.
	Supervise and mentor a team of pharmaceutical professionals.
	Ensure compliance with regulatory requirements, GMP, and quality standards.
	Collaborate cross-functionally with internal teams and external partners.
	Identify and mitigate project risks proactively.
	Represent the company at industry events, conferences, and stakeholder meetings.
	Stay current with pharmaceutical industry trends and regulatory developments.

	Bachelor's Degree in Pharmaceutical Sciences, Project Management, or a related field.
